stage_name: 通常レビュー指摘対応

should_fix.title: useEffect for mobileTab initialization adds a secondary responsibility to MarkdownEditor
should_fix.reason: 2-line useEffect does not warrant a dedicated hook. KISS/YAGNI justification documented. Re-evaluation trigger defined for when mobile-specific logic exceeds 3 locations.
should_fix.design_policy_section: 10. レビュー指摘事項と設計判断 > SF-001

should_fix.title: The two-change approach could be simplified to a single prop
should_fix.reason: initialMobileTab prop does not solve SSR hydration issue (useIsMobile returns false initially). useEffect is still required regardless. Current approach keeps mobile logic encapsulated in MarkdownEditor.
should_fix.design_policy_section: 10. レビュー指摘事項と設計判断 > SF-002

consider.reason: Will add code comment to desktop Modal MarkdownEditor call explaining intentional omission of initialViewMode.
Already documented in design policy section 3. Will validate during UAT.
